name: lab-weekly-update
description: Draft evidence-backed weekly lab updates from engineering artifacts, benchmark outputs, repo diffs, and notes.

interface.shortDescription: Draft lab weekly updates from technical work artifacts.
interface.longDescription: Lab Weekly Update turns repo diffs, benchmark artifacts, profiling outputs, experiment notes, and TODOs into concise evidence-backed weekly updates.
defaultPrompt: Create a weekly update from repo changes, benchmark artifacts, and notes.
